MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Mark Madnick, Esq. for Plaintiff: Acacia Bank, a California industrial bank and Bank one, Arizona, N.A., a National Banking Assoc.,
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Linda B.W. Lee as follows:
Damages $1,081,922.79
Prejudgment Interest $381,539.48
Attorney's Fees $1,061,799.06
Costs per memo of cost, for a total of $2,525,261.33
Judgment signed in open court.
See Attachment "A" in the Judgment for details.
See also Stipulated Judgment filed Dec. 2, 2005.
